reviews.comment:
El peor como socio del A.C.A. quise usar solo lad mesas y no me lo permitieron!!! Los empleados ... sumamente amables tratando de explicar la estúpida orden del dueño!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The worst experience ever as an A.C.A. member! I wanted to use only the tables and they wouldn't let me!!! The employees... extremely kind, trying to explain the owner's stupid order!!!!
